title: MIG-F6
shortDescription: HDPE lining. High impact, abrasion, cut & tear resistance. High visibility TPR (Thermo Plastic Rubber)
description: HDPE lining. High impact, abrasion, cut & tear resistance. High visibility TPR (Thermo Plastic Rubber)

features: High impact, abrasion, cut & tear resistance
Hi-Viz TPR on back of fingers & thumb
Foamed padding on palm for anti-vibration
attributes.composition: Touch screen compatible high visibility, reusable, three-dimensional impact glove, with reinforced thumb crotch, nitrile palm coating and TPR (Thermo Plastic Rubber) finger and back of hand protection; Black and white HDPE combined with steel fiber and elastane; Black Micro fiber with EVA padding; Knuckle region, with TPR (Thermo Plastic Rubber); Adjustable Hook and Loop closure; 285g per glove (size 10)
